  "findings": [
    "The suction line of the refrigerant line set is uninsulated, which will cause condensation, energy loss, and reduced system efficiency."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Install closed-cell elastomeric insulation (minimum 1/2 inch thickness or per manufacturer specifications) over the entire length of the suction line."
  ],
  "rationale": "The suction line must be insulated to prevent condensation drip (which can cause water damage) and to maintain system efficiency by preventing heat gain. Leaving it uninsulated violates standard manufacturer installation instructions and energy conservation codes.",
  "references": [
    "IMC Section 1101.10",
    "IRC Section M1411.6",
    "Manufacturer Installation Manual"
  ]
}
